2219600.name: The Ravendree Oracle
2219600.description:
Welcome to The Ravendree!

It’s 1928 and you’ve just entered the double doors of the hottest haunt in town, a nightclub called The Ravendree.

Meet Nora, card-flipping seer, who seems to have misplaced several of her oracle cards.
She can’t do readings without them, and she needs your help.
Travel around The Ravendree, talking to colorful characters, solving macabre puzzles, and following where the spirits lead you!


Gather up the cards you find, then use them to solve your way through the bizarre world of The Ravendree.
